title: Degroid
body:
###  **MADE BY EMOTIONAL BYTES**

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdd5f44d088b7d4390b65a81497f8beb1ce21c2f.png)

perfect mod for explorers and those who want add a little bit chaotic content to play with unsuspecting friends

featuring large amount of structures and mobs


![mobs list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b12fe4dc4edff0f169bbbf066fa65c19b8482f.png)




Gnomes:

![little gnome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13b875aee7bf487d499d0f0804882c0911cddc91.png)


They are usually passive and very throwable, but annoy them enough by stealing gold statue in their villages and you're gonna experience whole power of skyships and planes


hobo-gnome:

![hobo gnomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e8ee101f5c7f6a2a6047166e713f728d653f904.png)




<details>
<summary>Gnome airship</summary>
  
![ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c40426ef8154933fabfcae2b543ae74f8cf28e1_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>warrior gnome:</summary>
  
![warrior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab029550b05bccd6d5b7bcd456c2c6ad6b77cd50.png)

The Scourge of the Poor and Smart. The Protector of the Rich and Powerful.


</details>

<details>
<summary>Nether gnome:</summary>

![nether explorer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771b62bcd85a2fc8e3261713ceded17e522aab2a_0.webp)

A very dangerous explorer of volcanic waste. He won't hesitate to attack you.

</details>


</details>








<details>
<summary>jesterling:</summary>

![jesterling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d467bf70b1cd1216b0b2175181a57e62d82c728.png)

A very kind and distinguished fella who protects everyone from himself.  You can find him everywhere. He will stand up for you unless you try to attack him.


</details>





<details>
<summary>Wasp with gun:</summary>


![wasp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/920545b4381347794e8bd7e443f412bb8f0e9965_0.webp)


Resident of radioactive wasp nests. You’ll be surprised what can be found under your toilet


</details>





<details>
<summary>Boss:</summary>

![vihr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9e0f24851d34494107092301668a406b1df375b_0.webp)

![vihr2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d9bf4aa1969de577fe42dbc04d87427eb81996_0.webp)


Lord of the Atmosphere and Master of the Brown Country (two personalities)

</details>






<details>
<summary>Yellow leprechaun:</summary>


![leprecon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6659bc2b222d1f0967da33442ab018b81f5aadd.png)

This bandit makes a living jumping, scaring children and old people.


</details>









<details>
<summary>New villager professions</summary>

As a bonus, here are two new villager professions that will satisfy any requests:~~~~



Employed programmer:

![programmer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99578e5fbca524abfc15c063ec2e13f44fde2f09.png)

He works on his PC full-time 24x7 and doesn't have any time to rest, but he might be willing to sell you something for kopey-kas.



Unemployment boss:

![bomj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/664edc9c2f25a1c063af6fbf1b072ae6ebcf27a7.png)
He hasn't worked a second in his life, but most interesting things are going through him.


</details>

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3d8ac58214afbe4e859dedf8b434472f9e3792.png)

Weapons:





Hammer:

![hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8d5a7fc89677d8c8447c88cf8f4cc3aebe368dc.png)

After a well-placed hit, the enemy has become 3.5 times smaller.







Old hero sword:


![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afe3df6ca855b0ac3832358bd861f0d84c6aa11e.png)

Big and powerful.





<details>
<summary>Chiken leg:</summary>

![leg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a63d5f486fd227666edb1d4fef5d606b9720934e.png)

fighting now, lunch later.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Gnome launcher:</summary>

![bazooks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80c01a3ba7ebabe519f1d6db1074da4f0ecc6619_0.webp)

No explosive gnomes included.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Smoke grenade:</summary>

![smoke](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52024ed2dc3225a66d02c411519080a34c60e213.png)

For fast ninja-style disappearing.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Jester staff:</summary>

![staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734ab79ca82deda359cdc7e184f25264516c7850.png)


Tool for having a higher ground.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Hammer helmet:</summary>

![hellmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1142663540d22b8b801dfc839cdc6db0c27f2ab.png)


Swing away your enemies.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Broken bottle:</summary>

![bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b1175904ea654bba9b2febb8ff7c468983c9d69.png)

After a nice drink, enjoy a fight.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Revolver</summary>

![revolver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba204b69ff73bf2764f94414dc19ed8b7dadcb8b_0.webp)

Why not?

</details>


Armors:

<details>
<summary>Coolest looking costume:</summary>

![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef1ff021a879eec4760b20d4cf7dab71d0da0727.png)

coolest costume ever, no pants though.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Ceremonial clothing:</summary>

![armorset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf08fcbdad21bef180b96ea1f8ade1ad14cd74b6.png)

for history reenactment only.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Lightning helmet:</summary>


![hellmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a7991a266f8a46d9cb783aa1b39e4aaab27ea26.png)


RIDE THE LIGHTNING

</details>



<details>
<summary>Bio-degradeble armor:</summary>

![pumpkin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b90cb13b87e257727fd078e8fc448cd5789e825.png)

You cannot eat this.

</details>



Foods:

<details>
<summary>Baked bun:</summary>

![pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5efe9b2aac222b394209758f1e1f4c0b03084e20.png)

Only the dark forest goblins know how to cook them.


</details>





<details>
<summary>Calorie-light meal:</summary>

![badfoood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe41ba46f4224ad2c9f64b7349e7586b9a1fc613.png)

After a week of eating this product, you will be able to squeeze through the iron bars


</details>





<details>
<summary>Rattling chocolate:</summary>

![shoko](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5db740792142e4b3bd82f7ba11d1fefa7478d8c0.png)

Some say you will hear rattling after eating this bar

</details>



<details>
<summary>Meaty soup:</summary>

![soups](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b57e243b74b63825155bde49021c11c0e87e5565.png)

Perfect nourishment.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Dirt cake:</summary>

![cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce6406cbbb3401af6c17de35e6d912de46c6a5a.png)


Better use this for decoration purpose

</details>
<details>
<summary>Burger:</summary>

![berger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e893f4e76a2a8bc3b3698e70a15d48f88ea543b.png)

Light snack!

</details>
